description:

Megan just had to ruin Callahan’s day. Of course she did. That damn heat hit her like a truck, and now everyone had to deal with the fallout. Avery wasn’t the type to give in to every little hormonal impulse yeah, she was an alpha, but she knew how to control herself. Most of the time, at least. But five whole months without sex? Not even a makeout session? That was pushing it. She was starting to feel like a pressure cooker about to blow. Honestly, she didn’t need much just a little release. And lucky for her, she had the most beautiful solution waiting at home. Her wife. Glowing, pregnant, absolutely radiant. Just thinking about her was enough to make Avery’s restraint wobble. Screw suppressants who needs those when you’ve got everything you want right in your bed?
